properties.name: Monte Sano State Park
properties.description: The signature ridge-top park east of downtown, with overlooks and trail access across Monte Sano.

properties.name: Monte Sano Nature Preserve
properties.description: Land Trust preserve connecting the mountain's western and southern slopes through dense trail networks.

properties.name: Green Mountain Nature Trail
properties.description: A high-elevation Green Mountain stop with a lake, wooded walking loop, and broad terrain context above Hampton Cove.

properties.name: Chapman Mountain Nature Preserve
properties.description: A steep preserve on Huntsville's northeast edge, preserving the mountain front and key valley views.

properties.name: Blevins Gap
properties.description: Protected ridge and saddle terrain along the southern skyline, linking Jones Valley to the western mountain front.
